Р”РөРҪРёСҒ,

We reached a pretty amazing milestone earlier this month: 3 million learners are now using Educative to level up.

So, to celebrate you and our amazing user community, we decided to do something special:

Today, you can lock in 50% off (or more) from your Educative subscription.
